mapper.select:
select fco.ID,fco.SCHEME_NAME,iwf.PROGRAMME_NAME,fco.CREATE_BY,iwf.PREDICTION_TIME from FLOOD_CONTROL_OPERATION fco left join INCOMING_WATER_FORECAST iwf on iwf.ID = fco.FORECASTING_SCHEME_ID
AND fco.SCHEME_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{waterTransferReq.schemeName},'%')
AND fco.CREATE_BY LIKE CONCAT('%',#{waterTransferReq.createBy},'%')
AND iwf.PREDICTION_TIME BETWEEN #{waterTransferReq.startTime} and #{waterTransferReq.endTime}
